Doctor and homeopath

With more than forty years of dedication to Medicine, I offer you deeply personalized medical attention for you, your children and your family.

Deep Experience

More than 40 years dedicated to homeopathy to restore your health and comprehensive well-being.

Personal Attention

Detailed consultations (1-3h) to understand your unique case and treat the root cause of your ailments.

Holistic Approach

We treat you in your totality (body, mind, emotions) to find your natural and lasting balance.

Natural Healing

We stimulate your own healing capacity to achieve a well-being that is respectful to your organism.

Homeopathy

Homeopathy is a medical discipline with foundations dating back to Hippocrates and which was systematized by Dr. Samuel Christian Hahnemann in 1808. It is a therapeutic medical science based on rigorous clinical observation and profound respect for the natural laws of healing of the organism itself.

In my practice, with more than 40 years of experience, I apply Homeopathy as a precision medical tool. The goal is not to suppress symptoms, but to restore the organism's inherent self-regulation capacity, rebalancing the affected systems and organs to achieve a stable and lasting state of health. We treat the «Human Being» in their entirety, understanding that their physical, mental, and emotional dimension is indivisible.

The Human Being in you must be treated

The Principle of Similitude: The Therapeutic Key

The fundamental pillar of Homeopathy is the Principle of Similitude: «like cures like». This phenomenon, already described by Hippocrates and Paracelsus, was experimentally proven by Dr. Hahnemann and establishes that a substance capable of causing certain symptoms in a healthy individual can, in infinitesimal and specifically prepared doses, cure those same symptoms in a sick person.

The phenomenon of similitude is observed in numerous areas, including certain conventional medications. It is based on the fact that the same substance can have different or opposite effects depending on the dose used and the subject's sensitivity. This fact was described by Hippocrates, reformulated by Paracelsus and proven by Hahnemann, thus giving rise to one of the principles of Homeopathy.

The art of homeopathy

In high-level homeopathic medicine, our clinical work consists of carrying out a deep synthesis of all the facets that make up the person.

We will talk about your physical plane (specific symptoms, their modalities), your emotional plane (fears, sadness, anxieties), your mental plane (thought patterns, concentration) and even your spiritual plane (your sense of purpose, your vital conflicts).

The objective of this exhaustive investigation is to find the unique remedy (or simillimum) that resonates with your entire being. This remedy acts as a catalyst that initiates the self-healing process, stimulating the body's vital force.

Areas of application

Emotional and Mental Well-being
  • Background treatment for anxiety, fears, jealousy, depression or prolonged sadness, etc.
  • Support for behavioral, concentration or eating problems, both in adults and children, etc.
  • Management of stress, Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder, etc.
Chronic and Recurrent Conditions
  • Respiratory problems: Frequent colds, recurrent tonsillitis, asthma, etc.
  • Skin conditions: Atopic dermatitis and other skin conditions, etc.
  • Digestive disorders: Food intolerances, intestinal imbalances and much more, etc.
Support in Serious Illnesses
  • Protocols to alleviate the side effects of chemotherapy and other oncological treatments, improving the patient's quality of life, etc.
  • Treatment to counteract the adverse effects of drugs or post-vaccine sequelae, including those related to Covid-19 (Persistent Covid), etc.

(This list is merely indicative, since the individualized approach of homeopathy allows addressing practically any imbalance in which the organism needs a boost to recover its state of health.)

Our Main Treatments

Homeopathic Medicine

Recover your health addressing the root of your diseases.

Stop Smoking Treatment

Quit smoking in a single session. Natural and effective with bio-frequencies.

Complete Detoxification

Free your body from toxics, bacterial and viral loads, vaccine side effects and persistent Covid.

Family Medicine

Children, allergies, asthma and digestive disorders such as intolerances, etc.

“Before curing anyone, ask him if he is willing to give up the things that made him sick.”

— Hippocrates

“Health depends on being in harmony with our souls.”

— Edward Bach

“Medicine must integrate body, soul and spirit so that the treatment is true and lasting.”

— Rudolf Steiner

“The true doctor not only prescribes, but listens, understands and guides towards balance.”

— Anonymous

“Homeopathy does not treat diseases, but people who are sick.”

— André Saine

“The body whispers before it screams; the attentive doctor listens to the silence of the disease before it manifests.”

— Proposed Quote

“Technology heals, chemistry acts, but the soul is cured in the presence of love and listening.”

— Proposed Quote

“The physician's high and only mission is to restore the sick to health, to cure, as it is termed.”

— Samuel Hahnemann

“The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.”

— William Osler
